summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend code review verified all requested features. UI verification limited due to React Native Web text input handling - login fields don't register standard input events in web preview.

issues: React Native TextInput fields don't register standard HTML input events in web preview - requires native app testing for full verification

critical_code_review_comments: LOGIN BUTTON TEXT VERIFIED: login.tsx line 126 shows 'Log in' text (not 'Sign In') - confirmed in screenshots

HAMBURGER MENU VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 208-268 - Menu icon in header opens Modal slide-up sheet with items: La tua attivita, Archivio, Salvati, Preferiti, Amici stretti, Disponibilita toggle, Impostazioni e privacy, Esci
LIKE FEATURE VERIFIED: PostCard.tsx lines 147-173 - Shows recent liker thumbnails below heart icon with Italian text 'Piace a X e altri Y'
RECENT_LIKERS API VERIFIED: GET /api/posts returns posts with recent_likers array containing id, username, profile_image - backend test passed
LIKERS ENDPOINT VERIFIED: GET /api/posts/{post_id}/likers returns array of recent likers - backend test passed
LESSON NOTIFICATION VERIFIED: LessonNotificationBanner.tsx is full-screen Modal (line 200-257) with accept/reject buttons and continuous vibration+sound
VIDEO CALL AUTO-JOIN VERIFIED: video-call/[id].tsx uses Daily.co JS SDK with auto-join (no pre-join UI). Backend server.py line 1334 sets enable_prejoin_ui:false
USER PROFILE BACK BUTTON VERIFIED: user/[id].tsx line 160-162 has back button with Ionicons chevron-back
MESSAGE BUTTON VERIFIED: user/[id].tsx lines 222-224 - 'Messaggio' button shows Alert placeholder for upcoming messaging feature
PROFILE @USERNAME VERIFIED: profile.tsx line 206-207 shows @{user.username} in header
STORY HIGHLIGHTS VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 195-387 builds highlights from real userStories data with actual thumbnails
seed_data_creation: Created live session during backend testing (ended after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified via code review and backend testing. Key changes: 1) Profile hamburger menu is Instagram-style slide-up Modal sheet with Italian menu items. 2) PostCard shows recent liker thumbnails with 'Piace a X e altri Y' text. 3) LessonNotificationBanner is full-screen blocking Modal. 4) Video call auto-joins using Daily.co JS SDK (enable_prejoin_ui:false). 5) User profile has working back button (router.back()) and Message button (Alert placeholder). React Native Web text input fields require native app testing for full interaction verification.
